name: head-voice-input
description: Move the editor cursor with head tilt and dictate with ElevenLabs voice input while smiling

commands.title: Head Input: Set ElevenLabs API Key
Head Input: Clear ElevenLabs API Key

headInput.tiltSensitivity.description: Multiplier on detected head tilt; higher = more sensitive.

headInput.deadZoneDegrees.description: Degrees of head tilt ignored around neutral pose.

headInput.repeatRateHz.description: How often a sustained tilt fires repeated cursor moves.

headInput.verticalAction.description: Whether vertical head tilt moves the text cursor or scrolls the editor.

headInput.horizontalAction.description: Whether horizontal head tilt moves character-by-character or word-by-word.

headInput.smileOnThreshold.description: Smile blendshape value above which dictation begins.

headInput.smileOffThreshold.description: Smile blendshape value below which dictation ends.

headInput.smileOnHoldMs.description: Milliseconds the smile must be held before dictation begins.

headInput.smileOffHoldMs.description: Milliseconds the smile must drop before dictation ends.

headInput.elevenLabsLanguageCode.description: ElevenLabs Scribe language code (e.g. en, de, es).

headInput.autoOpenOnStartup.description: Open the input panel automatically when Cursor starts.

headInput.whistleEnabled.description: Whistle to move the cursor: each of four pitch bands triggers one direction.

headInput.whistleMinHz.description: Lower bound of the whistle frequency range. Pitches below are ignored.

headInput.whistleMaxHz.description: Upper bound of the whistle frequency range. Pitches above are ignored.

headInput.whistleSplit1Hz.description: Boundary between the down and left bands. Pitches below this fire 'down'.

headInput.whistleSplit2Hz.description: Boundary between the left and right bands.

headInput.whistleSplit3Hz.description: Boundary between the right and up bands. Pitches above this fire 'up'.

headInput.whistleClarity.description: Minimum YIN clarity score (0..1) before a sample is treated as a whistle. Higher = stricter.

headInput.whistleHoldMs.description: Milliseconds the whistle must hold one pitch band before firing.

headInput.whistleRepeatRateHz.description: How often a sustained whistle in one band fires repeated nudges.

headInput.dabEnabled.description: Dab to insert a newline (Enter) into the active editor.

headInput.dabHoldMs.description: Milliseconds the dab pose must be held before firing.

headInput.dabCooldownMs.description: After a dab fires, milliseconds before another dab is accepted.
